symbol_verify.notes: Quality gate APIs all appear in theory or demos (isna, fillna, duplicated, groupby nunique, strip/title, IQR, audit).

selfcheck.chosen_text: Generar violación/cuarentena o fail del gate
selfcheck.note: Theory nulls: required null ⇒ cuarentena/falla; never silent fill.
Theory: conflicto = misma clave, valores distintos; exacto = filas idénticas.
Theory cuarentena = filas rechazadas + razón; S16-T3-A-DEMO preserves evidence.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Fallar de forma explicable con el nombre de la columna
selfcheck.note: Theory schema drift: gate falla con mensaje claro; never silent defaults.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None]})
df = df.copy()
df["was_null"] = df["monto"].isna()
df["monto"] = df["monto"].fillna(0)
print(df["was_null"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None, None, 2.0]})
rate = float(df["monto"].isna().mean())
print("blocked" if rate > 0.3 else "ok")
exercises.note: Fixture 2/4 null=0.5 > 0.3 → blocked; theory imputation cap.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, None])
med = s.median()
filled = s.fillna(med)
print(float(med), float(filled.median()))
exercises.note: Hints median skipna then fillna; medians match for [1,2,None].

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"],
    "region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"],
})
conf = df.groupby("cliente_id").filter(lambda g: g["region"].nunique() > 1)
print(conf["cliente_id"].unique().tolist())

exercises.note: Hints ordered logic; single-row fixture → clean.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)].copy()
clean = df.drop_duplicates("id", keep="first")
print(len(q), len(clean))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "batch": ["b1", "b2", "b1"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
q = df[df.duplicated("id", keep=False)].copy()
print(q.columns.tolist())
exercises.note: Hints copy mask; keep batch column.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "b", "c"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
if df["id"].nunique() == len(df):
    print("card_ok")

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([" lima ", "CUSCO"])
print(s.str.strip().str.title().tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(["S/1.5", "S/2"])
vals = s.str.replace("S/", "", regex=False).str.strip().astype(float)
print(float(vals.sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region_raw": [" lima", "AREQUIPA "]})
df["region"] = df["region_raw"].str.strip().str.title()
print(df["region_raw"].tolist())
print(df["region"].tolist())
exercises.note: Theory conserve raw; demo keeps region_raw.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, -2.0, 3.0])
print((s < 0).tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, 3, 100])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
stat = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[stat].tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1, 2, -1])
val = -1
domain = val < 0
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
stat = (val < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) or (val > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
if domain:
    label = "error"
elif stat:
    label = "flag"
else:
    label = "ok"
print(label)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["C001"]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
print(missing)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
missing = [c for c in required if c not in df.columns]
print("drift" if missing else "schema_ok")

rows_in = 10
q = 3
print(rows_in - q)
exercises.note: Last demo metrics rows_clean = rows_in - quarantine.
